category_sources: source_facts.description says mtbl is an immutable sorted string table library; official README describes mtbl as a C library implementation of the Sorted String Table data structure.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is mtbl; official GitHub repository and README use mtbl.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository; README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official source-control repository URL and GitHub page shows farsightsec/mtbl with project files and README.
tags_sources: Official README describes SSTable files as immutable mappings of sorted keys to values, with C library interfaces for creating, searching, and merging SSTable files.
